channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: JD Vance Says Trump Administration "Screwed Up" Epstein Files Communication

media:content.media:description: JD Vance says Trump administration "absolutely" mishandled the communications surrounding Epstein files.

item.description: During a lengthy podcast interview with Joe Rogan released Wednesday, Vance pointed largely to former Attorney General Pam Bondi, who infamously stated that an alleged "client list" of Epstein's was "sitting on my desk right now."
item.content:encoded: During a lengthy podcast interview with Joe Rogan released Wednesday, Vance pointed largely to former Attorney General Pam Bondi, who infamously stated that an alleged "client list" of Epstein's was "sitting on my desk right now."

item.title: US Military Strikes Ship Trying To Breach Iran Port Blockade

media:content.media:description: It was the first time US has forcibly halted a vessel since reinstating the ports blockade on Tuesday.

item.description: A US aircraft fired on and disabled an unladen oil tanker Wednesday as it tried to break the naval blockade of Iran's ports, the US military said.
item.content:encoded: A US aircraft fired on and disabled an unladen oil tanker Wednesday as it tried to break the naval blockade of Iran's ports, the US military said.

item.title: Ukrainian Drone Kills Chief Engineer At Zaporizhzhia Nuclear Plant: Russia

media:content.media:description: The chief engineer at the Zaporizhzhia nuclear power plant has been killed by a Ukrainian drone.

item.description: The chief engineer at the Russian-controlled Zaporizhzhia nuclear power plant has been killed by a Ukrainian drone near the station, the head of Russia's state nuclear corporation Rosatom said on Wednesday.
item.content:encoded: The chief engineer at the Russian-controlled Zaporizhzhia nuclear power plant has been killed by a Ukrainian drone near the station, the head of Russia's state nuclear corporation Rosatom said on Wednesday.

item.title: Red Fort To Remain Closed Till August 15 For Independence Preparations

media:content.media:description: A senior ASI official said on Wednesday that such orders are issued every year ahead of Independence Day.

item.description: Delhi's iconic Red Fort complex has been closed to the public from July 15 till the 80th Independence Day celebrations on August 15, according to an official order.
item.content:encoded: Delhi's iconic Red Fort complex has been closed to the public from July 15 till the 80th Independence Day celebrations on August 15, according to an official order.

item.title: US Forces Launch New Wave Of Strikes Against Iran
item.description: The United States launched a new wave of strikes against Iran on Wednesday in a bid to curb Tehran's ability to threaten the Strait of Hormuz, the US military said.
item.content:encoded: The United States launched a new wave of strikes against Iran on Wednesday in a bid to curb Tehran's ability to threaten the Strait of Hormuz, the US military said.

item.title: Marco Rubio To Chair Global Meet On Far-Left Political Terrorism Today

media:content.media:description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio will chair the meeting on Thursday.

item.description: The US is hosting an international ministerial conference on Thursday to discuss the resurgence of "far-left political terrorism" and joint action to counter the "renewed threat" to society.
item.content:encoded: The US is hosting an international ministerial conference on Thursday to discuss the resurgence of "far-left political terrorism" and joint action to counter the "renewed threat" to society.

item.title: New Port, New Pipelines: Gulf Nations' Billion-Dollar Push To Bypass Hormuz

media:content.media:description: UAE, Iraq have started building major pipeline projects that would move oil around Hormuz

item.description: The goal is simple, to reduce dependence on one of the world's busiest oil routes and limit Tehran's ability to influence global energy supplies. Before the conflict, around one-fifth of the world's oil passed through the strait.
item.content:encoded: The goal is simple, to reduce dependence on one of the world's busiest oil routes and limit Tehran's ability to influence global energy supplies. Before the conflict, around one-fifth of the world's oil passed through the strait.

item.title: Dramatic Video Captures Wildfire Surrounding Freight Train In Canada: "Could Overtake Us Here"

media:content.media:description: CN Rail has temporarily suspended all operations in the affected region.

item.description: The crew members made a narrow escape, and all employees in the area have since been safely evacuated and relocated.
item.content:encoded: The crew members made a narrow escape, and all employees in the area have since been safely evacuated and relocated.

item.title: Trump Wanted '20% Hormuz Toll'. How Gulf Leaders Shut It Down In 24 Hours

media:content.media:description: Officials feared the toll would increase oil and gas prices and create political problems

item.description: According to CNN, US President Donald Trump's sudden announcement of the 20 per cent toll on cargo passing through the Strait of Hormuz prompted a frantic behind-the-scenes push by allies and senior officials to convince the US president to rethink the decision.
item.content:encoded: According to CNN, US President Donald Trump's sudden announcement of the 20 per cent toll on cargo passing through the Strait of Hormuz prompted a frantic behind-the-scenes push by allies and senior officials to convince the US president to rethink the decision.

item.title: Majority Of Sailors Killed In Hormuz Attacks Were Indians, Shows Data

media:content.media:description: Indians accounted for seven of the 16 seafarers nearly 44 per cent

item.description: Indians accounted for seven of the 16 seafarers, nearly 44 per cent, killed in attacks on commercial vessels during the Strait of Hormuz crisis between March 1 and July 14, 2026.
item.content:encoded: Indians accounted for seven of the 16 seafarers, nearly 44 per cent, killed in attacks on commercial vessels during the Strait of Hormuz crisis between March 1 and July 14, 2026.

item.title: PoK Neither "Azad" Nor "Disputed" But "Occupied": Local Leader At Rally

media:content.media:description: Addressing the crowd, Khan directly questioned Pak's decades-old narrative on PoK

item.description: Speaking before thousands gathered at Eidgah Ground, movement leader Sardar Aman Khan declared that the region was neither "Azad" nor "disputed", but an occupied territory.
item.content:encoded: Speaking before thousands gathered at Eidgah Ground, movement leader Sardar Aman Khan declared that the region was neither "Azad" nor "disputed", but an occupied territory.

item.title: Ukraine Says Will Do Everything Possible To Protect Its Seaports

media:content.media:description: Russia has sharply stepped up attacks in recent weeks on Ukrainian Black Sea ports. (Representational)

item.description: The country's main farmers' union UAC said the country had lost about a third of its capacity to export grain via its vital Black Sea ports due to intensifying Russian missile and drone attacks.
item.content:encoded: The country's main farmers' union UAC said the country had lost about a third of its capacity to export grain via its vital Black Sea ports due to intensifying Russian missile and drone attacks.

item.title: Why Iranian, Houthi Threats To Red Sea Shipping Matter More For Oil Now

media:content.media:description: The Red Sea is now a critical alternative outlet for Gulf oil

item.description: Closure of the Bab el-Mandeb strait - gateway to the Red Sea - would open a new front in the energy crisis and Iran's overarching conflict with the US.
item.content:encoded: Closure of the Bab el-Mandeb strait - gateway to the Red Sea - would open a new front in the energy crisis and Iran's overarching conflict with the US.

item.title: "Like My Lover": Chinese Users Bid Farewell To AI Companions

media:content.media:description: The regulations were jointly issued by five government departments

item.description: Chinese users of AI-powered companion bots have bid heart-rending farewells to their virtual buddies as national regulations took effect Wednesday aimed at curbing the risk of emotional dependency.
item.content:encoded: Chinese users of AI-powered companion bots have bid heart-rending farewells to their virtual buddies as national regulations took effect Wednesday aimed at curbing the risk of emotional dependency.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | The Growing Drone Wars In Myanmar
item.description: The junta did not invent Myanmar's drone battlefield. It learned it from its enemies. Now those enemies must learn how to defeat the very system they helped prove.
item.content:encoded: The junta did not invent Myanmar's drone battlefield. It learned it from its enemies. Now those enemies must learn how to defeat the very system they helped prove.

item.title: US Army Says Completed 90-Minute Wave Of Strikes On Iran
item.description: The US military said it had completed its latest wave of strikes against Iranian targets on Wednesday that "further degraded Iran's ability to attack commercial shipping in the Strait of Hormuz."
item.content:encoded: The US military said it had completed its latest wave of strikes against Iranian targets on Wednesday that "further degraded Iran's ability to attack commercial shipping in the Strait of Hormuz."

item.title: "Are You Muslim?" Indian Man Stabbed 15 Times In US Mall

media:content.media:description: The incident took place on Monday inside Valley Fair Mall in Utah

item.description: 48-year-old Peter Michael Larsen told investigators he deliberately targeted the victim because he was Muslim and that he "intends to kill Muslims".
item.content:encoded: 48-year-old Peter Michael Larsen told investigators he deliberately targeted the victim because he was Muslim and that he "intends to kill Muslims".

item.title: EU Announces "Drone Deal" With Ukraine To Boost Battlefield Technology

media:content.media:description: Europe is Ukraine's main backer in its war against Russia.

item.description: Ukraine has already signed similar deals with some individual EU countries and Gulf nations looking to tap into the expertise Kyiv has developed during more than four years of war with Russia.
item.content:encoded: Ukraine has already signed similar deals with some individual EU countries and Gulf nations looking to tap into the expertise Kyiv has developed during more than four years of war with Russia.

item.title: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei Funeral Highlights: Iran Begins Ali Khamenei's Funeral Procession through Tehran

media:content.media:description: Iran Former Supreme Leader's Khamenei Funeral: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's remains arrived in Tehran today.

item.description: Ali Khamenei's Last Rites Highlights: Authorities have shut down streets, airspace and daily life for the mourning, which will end on Thursday as the 86-year-old Khamenei is buried at the Imam Reza shrine in Mashhad, his birthplace
item.content:encoded: Ali Khamenei's Last Rites Highlights: Authorities have shut down streets, airspace and daily life for the mourning, which will end on Thursday as the 86-year-old Khamenei is buried at the Imam Reza shrine in Mashhad, his birthplace

item.title: Vietnam Boat Tragedy Highlights: Vietnam Orders Probe After Boat Tragedy Kills 15 Indian Tourists

media:content.media:description: Vietnam Boat Tragedy: At least 15 Indians, including 13 men and 2 women, were killed in the incident

item.description: Vietnam Boat Tragedy Highlights: The speedboat was ferrying 32 Indian tourists, three crew members and one Vietnamese tour guide from May Rut Ngoai Islet to An Thoi International Port
item.content:encoded: Vietnam Boat Tragedy Highlights: The speedboat was ferrying 32 Indian tourists, three crew members and one Vietnamese tour guide from May Rut Ngoai Islet to An Thoi International Port
